summary: Plan-mode live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was provided or inferred; each hydrated open PR is classified independently. No GitHub mutations, merge recommendations, fix PRs, or close actions are planned.

actions.reason: Independent open PR with supplied proof and passing checks; maintainer technical review is outside this cleanup shard, and closure is not justified.
Independent open PR with meaningful behavior scope and green proof/check evidence; it needs ordinary maintainer review, not inventory closeout.
Independent open PR with active validation blockers and waiting-on-author status; failing checks block merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout but do not justify closure in this inventory shard.
Independent open feature/API PR with compatibility risk and waiting-on-author label; this shard should not infer technical correctness or close it.
Independent open docs/doctor PR with failing checks and waiting-on-author status; no closure or merge planning is safe in this inventory shard.
